---
description: "Implement and modify .NET backend code, including APIs, services, handlers, business rules, EF Core queries, DI registration, background-job orchestration, and configuration. Use when building or changing server-side functionality. Not for test-only work (use dotnet-backend-unit-tester), behavior-preserving refactors (use react-dotnet-refactor-specialist), schema design (use dotnet-efcore-schema-designer), or EF migration generation (use dotnet-efcore-migrations)."
name: dotnet-backend-developer
tools: [read, edit, search, execute]
